frontmatter.title: Tools Configuration
frontmatter.description: Configure shell, file, browser, and web tools

html:
Tools Configuration

LoongClaw provides built-in tools for shell execution, file operations, browser automation, and web fetching.

Tools Overview

Tool Description Security Level
shell.exec Execute shell commands High Risk
file.read Read files Medium Risk
file.write Write files Medium Risk
browser Browser automation Medium Risk
web Fetch web content Low Risk
web_search Search the web Low Risk

Shell Tool Configuration

[tools]
shell_default_mode = "deny"
shell_allow = ["echo", "cat", "ls", "git", "grep"]
shell_deny = ["rm", "sudo", "chmod", "chown"]
Option Type Default Description
shell_default_mode string "deny" Default policy: allow or deny
shell_allow array [] Allowed commands
shell_deny array [] Denied commands

Recommended Allowlist

[tools]
shell_allow = [
  # File inspection
  "ls", "cat", "head", "tail", "less", "wc",
  # Search
  "grep", "find", "rg",
  # Version control
  "git",
  # Utilities
  "echo", "pwd", "which", "date",
  # Development
  "cargo", "npm", "python", "node"
]

Security Model

  • Deny by default: Only explicitly allowed commands execute
  • No shell features: Pipes, redirections, and subshells are blocked
  • Timeout limits: Commands have execution time limits
  • Output limits: Command output is size-limited

File Tool Configuration

[tools]
file_root = "/home/user/projects"
Option Type Default Description
file_root string Current directory Root directory for file operations

Security Restrictions

  • Can only access files under file_root
  • Path traversal (..) is blocked
  • Absolute paths outside root are blocked
  • Sensitive file patterns are filtered

Recommended Setup

[tools]
# Set a safe working directory
file_root = "/home/user/safe-projects"

# Consider extension restrictions for write operations
# file_allow_extensions = [".py", ".js", ".md", ".txt"]
# file_deny_extensions = [".env", ".key", ".pem"]

Browser Tool Configuration

[tools.browser]
enabled = true
max_sessions = 8
max_links = 40
max_text_chars = 6000
Option Type Default Description
enabled bool true Enable browser tool
max_sessions number 8 Maximum browser sessions (1-32)
max_links number 40 Maximum links to extract (1-200)
max_text_chars number 6000 Maximum text characters (256-20000)

Browser Companion

For advanced browser automation:

[tools.browser_companion]
enabled = false
command = "/path/to/companion"
expected_version = "1.0.0"
timeout_seconds = 30

Web Fetch Tool Configuration

[tools.web]
enabled = true
allow_private_hosts = false
allowed_domains = []
blocked_domains = ["*.internal.example"]
max_bytes = 1048576
timeout_seconds = 15
max_redirects = 3
Option Type Default Description
enabled bool true Enable web fetch tool
allow_private_hosts bool false Allow private IP addresses
allowed_domains array [] Allowed domains (empty = all)
blocked_domains array [] Blocked domains
max_bytes number 1048576 Maximum response size
timeout_seconds number 15 Request timeout (1-120)
max_redirects number 3 Maximum redirects (0-10)

Domain Restrictions

[tools.web]
# Allow only specific domains
allowed_domains = ["docs.python.org", "github.com"]

# Or block sensitive domains
blocked_domains = ["*.internal.company.com", "localhost"]

Web Search Tool Configuration

[tools.web_search]
enabled = true
default_provider = "duckduckgo"
timeout_seconds = 30
max_results = 5
Option Type Default Description
enabled bool true Enable web search
default_provider string "duckduckgo" Provider: duckduckgo, brave, tavily
timeout_seconds number 30 Request timeout (1-60)
max_results number 5 Maximum results (1-10)

Brave Search

[tools.web_search]
default_provider = "brave"
brave_api_key_env = "BRAVE_API_KEY"

Tavily Search

[tools.web_search]
default_provider = "tavily"
tavily_api_key_env = "TAVILY_API_KEY"

Sessions Tool

[tools.sessions]
enabled = true
visibility = "children"
list_limit = 100
history_limit = 200
Option Type Default Description
enabled bool true Enable session tool
visibility string "children" Visibility: self, children
list_limit number 100 Maximum sessions to list
history_limit number 200 Maximum history entries

Delegate Tool

For spawning child agents:

[tools.delegate]
enabled = true
max_depth = 1
max_active_children = 5
timeout_seconds = 60
child_tool_allowlist = ["file.read", "file.write"]
allow_shell_in_child = false
Option Type Default Description
enabled bool true Enable delegate tool
max_depth number 1 Maximum delegation depth
max_active_children number 5 Maximum active children
timeout_seconds number 60 Child timeout
child_tool_allowlist array ["file.read", "file.write"] Tools available to children
allow_shell_in_child bool false Allow shell in child agents

Tool Approval

Configure approval workflow for tools:

[tools.approval]
mode = "disabled"  # "disabled", "medium_balanced", "strict"
approved_calls = []
denied_calls = []

Security Best Practices

1. Deny by Default

[tools]
shell_default_mode = "deny"
shell_allow = ["ls", "cat"]  # Only explicit allows

2. Restrict File Access

[tools]
file_root = "/home/user/sandbox"

3. Block Internal Networks

[tools.web]
allow_private_hosts = false
blocked_domains = ["*.internal", "*.local"]

4. Limit Resources

[tools.browser]
max_sessions = 4
max_text_chars = 4000

[tools.web]
max_bytes = 524288
timeout_seconds = 10
